coordinate_system: original source-image pixels interpolated between photo-fitted component-side package centres
promotion_rule: factory drawing registration establishes component identity and placement only, never electrical connectivity

targets.observation: vertical C12 between D94 and D100; owner component view shows the landing area without an unambiguous fitted body
vertical C9 between D100 and D98; owner component view is hidden by the black factory cable

factory_bom.observation: the equipment-list MLT-0.125 6.2 kohm +/-5% row assigns exactly three pieces to DGSh5.087.009; this differs from the target DGSh5.109.009 designation and is corroboration, not target-board identity proof

owner_photos.observation: all three adjacent bodies have matching construction; glare crosses the printed value lines
alternate angle resolves 6K2 on R87 and R88; R89 is partly socket-obscured but is visually identical

d94_pullup_value_evidence.promotion_basis: registered row of three visually identical bodies and two directly readable 6K2 markings; the separately designated equipment-list group of exactly three is corroborative only

d94_pullups.observation: leftmost factory-drawn and component-photo body; reflected solder trace runs from its signal pad to D94.13, while its opposite pad enters the common tinned +5 V rail
middle factory-drawn and component-photo body; reflected solder trace runs from its signal pad to D94.14, while its opposite pad enters the common tinned +5 V rail
rightmost body adjacent to D94; reflected solder copper directly joins its signal pad to D94.1, while its opposite pad enters the common tinned +5 V rail; no further D0 branch is promoted
